source: Invest Like the Best — The cyclone under the surface (EP.260)
summary: Large internet/cloud/advertising platforms are levered royalties on global GDP with a structural tailwind from the rising share of revenue that companies spend with them

tickers_audited.reasoning: Baker specifically named Google/Alphabet as one of the dominant internet/advertising/cloud platforms that function as structural royalties on GDP in this exact thesis.
Baker specifically named Meta as a core internet advertising platform directly subject to the cohort analysis and royalty-on-GDP framework described in this thesis.
Baker specifically named Amazon as one of the large internet/cloud/advertising platforms that are the direct subject of this structural royalty-on-GDP thesis.
Baker specifically named Microsoft as one of the dominant cloud/internet platforms directly subject to this thesis, capturing the rising share of corporate revenue flowing to these platforms.
